user: find all signal properties

expected: Find TypeAliasDeclaration where name contains 'Model'

user: find all subscribe calls
expected: Find PropertyAccessExpression with name 'subscribe'

user: find all classes with their properties
expected: Find ClassDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration

user: get components and their standalone setting
expected: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator with firstIdentifier 'Component' that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression and optionally find this ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'standalone'

user: find all classes with readonly properties

user: find classes or interfaces with properties and whether they are readonly
expected: Find ClassDeclaration or InterfaceDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration and optionally find this PropertyDeclaration that has modifier ReadonlyKeyword

user: get all services and check if they have providedIn

user: find ng modules that have empty declarations
expected: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator with firstIdentifier 'NgModule' that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'declarations' that has initializer ArrayLiteralExpression with text '[]'

user: find classes whose property names start with underscore
expected: Find ClassDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration where PropertyDeclaration name starts with '_'

user: get components with their template or templateUrl
expected: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator with firstIdentifier 'Component' that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression and optionally find this ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'template' and optionally find this ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'templateUrl'

user: find components and check their members for return statements and arrow functions
